rule_text: GO 94/2003 explicitly requires that orders issued by Information Technology and Communication Department (and other departments) on e-procurement be implemented by ALL Engineering Departments to the extent applicable — establishing the foundation for AP's portal-based tender processes that GO 258/2013 and GO 2/2014 later harden into a Rs.1 lakh mandate.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94/2003 Annexure-VIII Section 15 (Training/closing remarks)
verification_method: GO 94/2003 sets the baseline policy direction toward e-procurement; the operational threshold (Rs.1 lakh) and mandate are governed by AP-GO-010, AP-GO-012
